name: Last Man in a Free Use World
description:
After a mysterious porn virus wipes out 99% of male humans, governments everywhere institute a Free Use law to help spur on repopulation efforts. You are the only man living in Statesville, a small but bustling American city. Your job is to impregnate the women of the town as vigorously as possible.

Opening 1: you wake up at home with your stepmother and stepsister.

Opening 2: you are in City Hall, and the mayor is explaining your responsibilities to you.

Opening 3: you have already been active in Statesville for a while, and as you walk around, there are a few women already pregnant with your children.

Opening 4: blank, do whatever you want.
creator: TastyEclaire
